meaning: 鬩ｬ蟆ｼ關ｨ闔ｱ譁ｯ[蜩･莨ｦ豈比ｺ夊･ｿ驛ｨ蝓主ｸ﹅
examples: Sniffer dogs are searching for dozens of people who are feared buried under mud and rubble after their houses were washed away in the town of Manizales.
Armenia, Barranquilla, Bogota, Cali, Cartagena, Manizales, Medellin and Pereira are the cities chosen to host the tournament.
Agudelo was born in Manizales, Colombia.
